name: agent-orchestrator-marketplace
description: Autonomous meta-agent orchestrator for Claude Code. Coordinates Haiku brainstormers, NotebookLM RAG, and Codex instances to solve complex tasks end-to-end.

plugins.name: agent-orchestrator
plugins.description: 5-phase autonomous orchestration: Research (5 Haiku agents) → Strategic Planning (NotebookLM RAG) → Execution (Codex swarm) → Quality Gate (9.0/10 threshold) → Synthesis (3-round self-critique).
